entry.title: World-Model Guided Policy Learning for Embodied Navigation
entry.summary: We present a world-model guided policy framework for embodied navigation. The method combines latent imagination and online correction to improve long-horizon control stability.

entry.title: Tool-Using LLM Agents with Verifiable Reasoning
entry.summary: We introduce an LLM agent architecture with explicit tool planning and verifiable reasoning traces. Experiments show gains on coding, retrieval and decision benchmarks.
